original_snippet_context: The article primarily discusses political tolerance and amnesty following a revolt in 1893. The reference to the revolt of 1904 is used as a point of comparison to demonstrate the double standard in the application of amnesty.
relevant_quote: Os revoltosos de 93 são uns réprobos e que o seu crime é maior do que o dos revoltosos de 14 de novembro de 1904.
justification: The mention of "14 de novembro de 1904" refers to a political revolt and subsequent amnesty. While not directly related to the Caixa de Conversão itself, it pertains to the political and economic context of Brazil during this period.  The article highlights the inconsistencies in political tolerance, specifically in relation to amnesty, and could have influenced the public discourse on the Caixa indirectly.
